ip_outcome_note: Son Goku (Dragon Ball franchise, Akira Toriyama / Toei Animation) confirmed via Bandai official character-tag field for BT1-060: character 'Son Goku', era 'Battle of Gods Saga'. Internal Bandai IP — no external crossover risk. No IP callout block required.

trivia_bullets.text: Galactic Battle (DBS-B01, July 28, 2017) is the inaugural set of the Dragon Ball Super Card Game — the first 114-card English-language release with 60 commons, 30 uncommons, 12 rares, 8 super rares, and 4 special rares.
BT1-060 is a Green Battle card, cost 2 (1 Green required), 15,000 power, 5,000 combo power, Saiyan special trait, Battle of Gods Saga era.

IP verified: Son Goku (Dragon Ball franchise) confirmed by Bandai character-tag 'Son Goku', era 'Battle of Gods Saga'. The Battle of Gods Saga is the DBS opening arc where Goku encounters Beerus and unlocks Super Saiyan God.

Galactic Battle sealed boxes were retired in late 2018; by Q3 2020 supply dried up globally, reaching approximately $600-$700 per sealed box by February 2021. Individual BT1 commons retain very low raw-single value ($0.14) reflecting the high launch-wave print run.
